package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_finalizer_used_for_regular_cleanup: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag runtime.SetFinalizer use for ordinary resource cleanup instead of explicit Close ownership.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule539NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario539Negative(records []Rule539NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
